root_text.an5.116:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.116:1.5: ananuvicca apariyogāhetvā appasādanīye ṭhāne pasādaṁ upadaṁseti,
root_text.an5.116:1.6: ananuvicca apariyogāhetvā pasādanīye ṭhāne appasādaṁ upadaṁseti,
root_text.an5.116:1.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.116:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.116:2.5: anuvicca pariyogāhetvā appasādanīye ṭhāne appasādaṁ upadaṁseti,
root_text.an5.116:2.6: anuvicca pariyogāhetvā pasādanīye ṭhāne pasādaṁ upadaṁseti,
root_text.an5.116:2.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgatā bhikkhunī yathābhataṁ nikkhittā evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.116:1.1: “Mendicants, a nun with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.116:1.3: Without examining or scrutinizing, she praises those deserving of criticism,
translation_text.an5.116:1.4: and criticizes those deserving of praise.
translation_text.an5.116:1.5: She arouses faith in things that are dubious,
translation_text.an5.116:1.6: and doesn’t arouse faith in things that are inspiring.
translation_text.an5.116:1.7: And she wastes gifts given in faith.
translation_text.an5.116:1.8: A nun with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.116:2.1: A nun with five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.116:2.3: After examining and scrutinizing, she criticizes those deserving of criticism,
translation_text.an5.116:2.4: and praises those deserving of praise.
translation_text.an5.116:2.5: She doesn’t arouse faith in things that are dubious,
translation_text.an5.116:2.6: and does arouse faith in things that are inspiring.
translation_text.an5.116:2.7: And she doesn’t waste gifts given in faith.
translation_text.an5.116:2.8: A nun with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
